outputs.main.sas:
library(haven)
library(dplyr)
library(rtables)
library(tibble)

# Read ADSL dataset
adsl <- read_xpt("adam/adsl.xpt")

# Filter to All Screened population
adsl_screen <- adsl %>%
  filter(SAFFL == "Y" | ITTFL == "Y" | !is.na(SCRFREAS))

# Create treatment variable
adsl_screen <- adsl_screen %>%
  mutate(TRT01AN = case_when(
    is.na(TRT01AN) ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ TRT01AN
  ),
  TRT01A = case_when(
    TRT01AN == 0 ~ "Placebo",
    TRT01AN == 54 ~ "Xanomeline Low Dose",
    TRT01AN == 81 ~ "Xanomeline High Dose",
    TRUE ~ as.character(TRT01A)
  ))

# Define analysis functions
count_subjects <- function(df, .var, .N_col) {
  n <- length(unique(df$USUBJID))
  c(n, n / .N_col * 100)
}

# Create layout
lyt <- basic_table(
  title = "Table 14-1.01",
  subtitles = "Screening Summary",
  main_footer = "Program: 14-1-01.R"
) %>%
  split_cols_by("TRT01A", split_fun = keep_split_levels(c("Placebo", "Xanomeline Low Dose", "Xanomeline High Dose"))) %>%
  add_colcounts() %>%
  analyze("USUBJID", function(x, .N_col) {
    n <- length(unique(x))
    pct <- n / .N_col * 100
    rcell(c(n, pct), format = "xx (xx.x%)")
  }, show_labels = "hidden", var_labels = "Number of Subjects Screened") %>%
  split_rows_by("SCRFREAS", split_fun = drop_split_levels, child_labels = "visible") %>%
  analyze("USUBJID", function(x, .N_col) {
    n <- length(unique(x))
    pct <- n / .N_col * 100
    rcell(c(n, pct), format = "xx (xx.x%)")
  }, show_labels = "hidden")

# Build table
tbl <- build_table(lyt, adsl_screen, alt_counts_df = adsl_screen)

# Alternative approach using manual construction
adsl_all <- adsl_screen %>%
  mutate(TRT01A = factor(TRT01A, levels = c("Placebo", "Xanomeline Low Dose", "Xanomeline High Dose")))

# Count screened subjects
screened <- adsl_all %>%
  group_by(TRT01A) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = TRT01A, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

# Count screen failures
screen_fail <- adsl_all %>%
  filter(!is.na(SCRFREAS)) %>%
  group_by(TRT01A, SCRFREAS) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = TRT01A, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

# Count randomized subjects
randomized <- adsl_all %>%
  filter(RANDFL == "Y") %>%
  group_by(TRT01A) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = TRT01A, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

# Create final table using rtables
lyt2 <- basic_table(
  title = "Table 14-1.01",
  subtitles = "Screening Summary",
  main_footer = "Program: 14-1-01.R"
) %>%
  split_cols_by("TRT01A") %>%
  add_colcounts() %>%
  summarize_row_groups(cfun = function(df, labelstr, .N_col) {
    n <- nrow(df)
    pct <- n / .N_col * 100
    rcell(c(n, pct), format = "xx (xx.x%)", label = "Number of Subjects Screened")
  }) %>%
  split_rows_by("SCRFREAS", split_fun = drop_split_levels, 
                child_labels = "visible", label_pos = "topleft") %>%
  summarize_row_groups(cfun = function(df, labelstr, .N_col) {
    n <- nrow(df)
    pct <- n / .N_col * 100
    rcell(c(n, pct), format = "xx (xx.x%)")
  })

# Build final table
result <- build_table(lyt2, adsl_all)

# Export to RTF
rtables::export_as_rtf(result, file = "output/14-1-01.rtf",
                       colwidths = c(4, 2, 2, 2))
